EDIT CHUNK
🧠  MASTERMIND AUTONOMOUS BUSINESS BRAIN · 10 DOMAINS · SELF-IMPROVING
MONOGRAPH
Parse & Pipeline
Arrow Function Extractor
Extracts const/let arrow functions from TS/JS source with export detection.
parse.ts
C# Namespace Extractor
Extracts namespace declarations from .cs files using regex matching.
parse.ts
Variable Phase
Top-level variable declaration extraction for TS/JS files.
variables-phase.ts
Field Access Phase
Tracks property/field access patterns across the codebase.
field-access.ts
Wildcard Synthesis
Synthesizes wildcard import/export edges into real symbol edges.
wildcard-phase.ts
Framework Detector
Detects React, Vue, Angular, Next.js, Express and other frameworks.
framework-detect.ts
Import Resolver
Resolves TypeScript path aliases and tsconfig paths to real files.
import-resolver.ts
Evidence Phase
Collects confidence evidence for edges based on multiple signals.
evidence.ts
Graph Algorithms
PageRank
Power iteration PageRank (d=0.85) to find influential nodes in the graph.
pagerank.ts
Topological Sort
Kahn's algorithm on reversed graph for dependency ordering.
topo-sort.ts
Weakly Connected Components
Union-find WCC detection to find isolated subgraphs.
wcc.ts
Cycle Detection (SCC)
Kosaraju's SCC algorithm to find circular dependencies.
cycles.ts
Dead Code Detection
Finds unexported nodes with in-degree 0 — unreachable symbols.
dead-code.ts
Import Chain Tracer
DFS traversal to find all import paths between any two nodes.
import-chain.ts
Ripple Impact
Multi-hop cascade analysis — which nodes are affected by a change.
ripple-impact.ts
Graph Statistics
Density, clustering coefficient, average path length, diameter.
statistics.ts
Analysis & Scoring
Surprise Scorer
5-factor scoring: cross-type, cross-community, cross-filetype, MRO, god-node bonuses.
surprise-scorer.ts
File Classifier
Classifies files as CODE, TEST, CONFIG, DOCUMENT or PAPER using 12 content signals.
file-classifier.ts
Corpus Health
Checks corpus for too-small / too-large / too-many-files thresholds.
corpus-health.ts
Cluster Quality
Silhouette score and modularity score for community quality assessment.
cluster-quality.ts
Node Similarity
Jaccard similarity on neighbor sets to find structurally similar nodes.
node-similarity.ts
Dependency Health
Detects circular deps, fan-in/fan-out violations, instability metrics.
dependency-health.ts
Betweenness Centrality
Identifies bridge nodes whose removal would disconnect the graph.
analyzer.ts
Graph Benchmark
Tracks pipeline performance metrics across builds over time.
benchmark.ts
Blast Radius (Impact)
BFS upstream/downstream traversal — find all files that depend on a node.
monograph_impact
360° Context View
Importers, imports, parent, and community siblings for any node.
monograph_context
Community Cohesion
Ratio of intra-community edges to max possible — identifies loose clusters.
monograph_cohesion
Bridge Nodes
Cross-community connectors — architectural coupling points with cross-edge count.
monograph_bridge
Rename (Dry-run)
Graph-assisted multi-file rename — finds all graph + text occurrences with confidence tags.
monograph_rename
Cypher Query
MATCH (n:Class)-[:IMPORTS]->(b) style graph queries translated to SQL.
monograph_cypher
Detect Changes
Maps git diff changed files → graph nodes + 1-level dependents.
monograph_detect_changes
Dead Code Analysis
Unused Exports
Reference-set inversion over the module graph — finds every export not consumed by any reachable file. Handles re-exports, type-only guards, and CJS modules.
monograph_unlinked_refs
Unused Files
Graph-reachability scan from all entry points — files with no reachable importer are flagged. Integrates with suppress rules and plugin-provided entry patterns.
analyze/unused-files.ts
Unused Dependencies
Correlates npm package names against actual imports across the module graph. Finds unused, unresolved, and type-only dependencies.
analyze/unused-deps.ts
Boundary Violations
Zone classification with caching + isImportAllowed edge checking. Supports 4 presets: layered, hexagonal, feature-sliced, bulletproof.
monograph_boundary_check
Graph Reachability
Marks reachable/runtime-reachable/test-reachable flags on all module nodes from entry points using BFS. collectUnreachable enumerates dead files.
monograph_reachability
Cycle Detection (Tarjan)
Iterative Tarjan SCC for circular dependency detection — no recursion stack overflow on large graphs. Returns cycle groups sorted by size.
monograph_find_cycles
Namespace Import Narrowing
Tracks member accesses on namespace imports, marks all-exports-referenced, and prunes unused import bindings from the symbol set.
graph/narrowing.ts
Suppression System
IssueKind (20 variants) with discriminant round-trip encoding for compact storage. Detects file-wide vs line-level suppression comments.
monograph_suppress
Duplication Detection
Suffix Array (O(N log N))
Prefix-doubling suffix array construction for exact clone detection. Paired with Kasai's O(N) LCP array algorithm for longest common prefix.
monograph_clone_detect
Shingle Filter
MinHash-inspired k-shingle pre-filter that narrows candidate pairs before the expensive suffix-array pass. Configurable shingle size.
duplicates/detect/filtering.ts
Clone Group Extraction
Extracts raw instance/group pairs from LCP array using the suffix + threshold approach. Handles overlapping spans with interval deduplication.
duplicates/detect/extraction.ts
Clone Families
Groups clone instances by file-set key into families, generates refactoring suggestions: ExtractFunction / ExtractModule / MergeDirectories.
monograph_similar_files
Mirrored Directories
Pairs directories whose file sets overlap (Jaccard ≥ 0.5) — identifies copy-paste directory structures that should be merged.
monograph_mirrored_dirs
Duplication Stats
Per-file deduplicated line sets (no double-counting), duplicated token counting, and duplication % across the full pipeline.
graph/duplication-stats.ts
Health Scoring
Vital Signs
0–100 health score from complexity, maintainability, duplication, dead-code penalties. JSONL snapshot persistence with trend detection (improving/degrading/stable).
monograph_vital_signs_snapshot
Hotspot Scoring
Composite hotspot score from churn × complexity. Normalization maxima computation + normalizeHotspotScore for cross-project comparison.
monograph_hotspots
Ownership Risk
Bus factor computation with bot-pattern filtering. Identifies single-owner files and computes ownership risk from git-blame contributor records.
monograph_codeowners
Effort Estimation
Converts duplicated line count to effort (hours/days) and confidence level using log-scale calibrated thresholds.
health/target-types.ts
Health Grouping
Groups files by owner, computes per-group aggregate scores, and builds a health grouping for team-level health dashboards.
health/health-grouping.ts
Scoring Types
CRAP score density, dead-code ratio, and Maintainability Index (171 − 5.2·ln(V) − 0.23·G − 16.2·ln(L)) per file.
monograph_maintainability
Report Formatters
Check Report Formatter
buildCheckHumanLines: grouped/truncated sections for unused files, exports, deps, members, unresolved imports. Category headers with item counts.
report/human-check.ts
Duplication Formatter
buildDuplicationFamilyLines: clone groups sorted by line count, instance listings with file:start-end format, stats summary, suggestions.
report/human-dupes.ts
Health Report Formatter
buildHealthHumanLines: vital signs with OK/WARNING/CRITICAL indicators, top N hotspot table, coverage gap listings, configurable limits.
report/human-health.ts
Config, Plugins & Discovery
Built-in Plugin Registry
30 built-in plugins (eslint, jest, vitest, prettier, vite, webpack, storybook, nx, turborepo, playwright, cypress, husky, docker, vercel, netlify, …). Prevents false positives on tool config files. 60 always-dev-tooling prefixes.
config/plugins/builtin.ts
Boundary Config
4 architecture presets (layered, hexagonal, feature-sliced, bulletproof) with full zone/rule resolution. isImportAllowed checks any cross-file import against the active preset.
monograph_boundary_check
Config File Parser
Walk-up VCS-stop config file discovery, JSON/JSONC/TOML format detection, JSONC comment stripping, sourceRoot auto-detection from src/lib/app.
config/config-parsing.ts
Infrastructure Entry Points
Scans Dockerfile, Procfile, fly.toml, render.yaml, railway.toml for CMD/ENTRYPOINT/command references to .js/.ts files. Prevents false unreachability reports.
discover/infrastructure-entries.ts
Entry Point Categorization
Classifies entry points as app/lib/bin/test/infra with formatSkippedEntryWarning and deduplication by canonical path.
discover/entry-points.ts
Output Format Parser
Parses output format strings with CLI alias normalisation (codeclimate → code-climate). Validates against all supported output format variants.
config/output-format.ts
Fix, Actions & Baseline
Export Surgery
Surgical removal of a specific name from export { a, b, unusedName } lists — without deleting the entire statement. Handles aliases, type exports, multi-line spans, and batched multi-surgery.
fix/export-surgery.ts
JSON Action Specs
Machine-readable action objects: delete-file, remove-export, export-type, remove-dependency, add-suppression. buildActionsFor* helpers produce the full action list per issue type.
report/json-actions.ts
Baseline Deltas
Unified cross-category issue diffing: CategoryDelta per issue type, filterNewIssues removes anything already in baseline, formatBaselineDeltas produces human-readable summary lines.
monograph_baseline_compare
Analysis Result Set
25-type complete result system with 17 issue arrays. makeEmptyResults, totalIssues, hasIssues, sortResults helpers for composing multi-pass analysis output.
results/analysis-results.ts
Export Formats
JSON
Native graph format with all node/edge metadata.
.json
GraphML
XML-based format with community attributes for Gephi/yEd.
.graphml
Mermaid
Flowchart diagram with subgraphs per community, dashed INFERRED edges.
.mmd
DOT (Graphviz)
Graphviz DOT format for layout with neato/dot/fdp engines.
.dot
GEXF
GEXF 1.3 XML for Gephi with full metadata support.
.gexf
SVG
Static SVG diagram with force-directed layout.
.svg
Cypher
Neo4j Cypher CREATE statements for graph database import.
.cypher
CSV
Node and edge CSV files for spreadsheet analysis.
.csv
Adjacency Matrix
Square matrix representation with node ID headers.
.csv
HTML Report
Self-contained interactive HTML with full graph visualization.
.html
Search & Retrieval
Hybrid RRF Search
Reciprocal Rank Fusion combining BM25 FTS + vector similarity.
rrf.ts
Exact Vector Search
Brute-force cosine similarity when ANN index isn't available.
exact-search.ts
Diacritic Search
Normalizes accented characters for language-aware search.
diacritic.ts
AST Chunker
Splits code into semantic chunks at function/class boundaries.
ast-chunker.ts
Embedding Staleness
Content-hash tracking to detect and re-embed stale nodes.
embedding-store.ts
Groups & Contracts
gRPC Contract Extractor
Parses .proto files and Go/Node/Python/Java gRPC clients into contracts.
grpc-extractor.ts
Topic Contract Extractor
Detects Kafka, RabbitMQ, SQS and generic pub/sub topic contracts.
topic-extractor.ts
Service Boundary Detector
Identifies service boundaries from HTTP clients, gRPC stubs, and DB access.
service-boundary.ts
Contract Bridge
Links producers and consumers across service boundaries.
contract-bridge.ts
Wiki & Knowledge
Wiki Generator
Auto-generates wiki pages from graph analysis. Supports reviewOnly mode for pre-flight checks.
wiki-generator.ts
Provider-Aware LLM
Anthropic / OpenAI / Ollama support with special handling for o1/o3/o4-mini reasoning models.
providers.ts
Gist Publisher
Publishes wiki pages to GitHub Gist with upsert support.
gist-publisher.ts
Graph Report
Generates Markdown report with knowledge gap section for isolated nodes.
graph-report.ts
Docs KG Parser
Parses .md/.mdx/.txt/.rst into Section nodes. Extracts headings, YAML frontmatter, wiki links, and #hashtags into the graph.
docs-parse.ts
Wiki Links
[[WikiLink]] and [text](./file.md) resolve to REFERENCES edges between Section and File nodes with deferred resolution.
REFERENCES edge
Section Hierarchy
H1 → H2 → H3 nesting expressed as PARENT_SECTION edges. Navigate like a tree with monograph_neighbors.
PARENT_SECTION edge
Tag Graph
Frontmatter tags/categories and inline #hashtags become Concept nodes connected via TAGGED_AS edges — enables topic-based graph traversal.
TAGGED_AS edge
Hybrid Doc Search
Section content is embedded at build time. Query with mode=hybrid for BM25+cosine RRF merge — semantic search across all docs.
monograph_query
Ingest & Input
URL Ingest
Fetches and ingests web content into the knowledge graph.
url-ingest.ts
Git Clone / Pull
SSRF-protected git clone and pull for remote repository ingestion.
git-clone.ts
Transcription
Audio/video transcription via whisper/yt-dlp pipeline.
transcribe.ts
Query Memory
Saves Q&A pairs as Markdown+YAML for persistent knowledge.
query-memory.ts
CLI & Platform
Platform Installs
14-platform hook installer (Claude, GitHub Actions, Cursor, VSCode, etc.) with marker blocks.
platforms.ts
Embedding Device
--embedding-device flag: auto/cpu/dml/cuda/wasm selection.
analyze.ts
Marker-Based Hooks
Idempotent hook installs using start/end marker blocks with Husky detection.
hooks-install.ts
Language Parsers
Symbol extractors for Scala, Lua, Zig, PowerShell, Elixir.
language-parsers.ts
○ IDLE
Algorithms
Impact
Quality
Dead Code
Duplication
Health & Quality
SELECT AN ANALYSIS →
Search nodes
–
Impact / Blast Radius
–
Context (360° view)
–
Explain node
–
Shortest path
→
–

→
–
Cypher Query
–
Ask the graph
–
EXPORT GRAPH
Download the knowledge graph in various formats
⚠ Dashboard exports use the visible 500-node subset. For full 54K-node exports, use: monomind monograph export --format json
JSON
Full graph with all node and edge metadata
.json
GraphML
XML with community attributes for Gephi / yEd
.graphml
Mermaid
Flowchart diagram with community subgraphs
.mmd
DOT (Graphviz)
Graphviz DOT format for layout engines
.dot
GEXF
GEXF 1.3 XML for Gephi with full metadata
.gexf
Cypher
Neo4j CREATE statements for graph database
.cypher
CSV (Nodes)
Node list with id, label, type, degree
nodes.csv
CSV (Edges)
Edge list with source, target, relation
edges.csv
Adjacency Matrix
Square matrix CSV representation
matrix.csv
HTML Report
Open interactive graph visualization
.html
